global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a focus on food delivery.
global.main_message: Quick and convenient dinner options available for order.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Dinner in minutes' prominently displayed at the bottom.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Two simple line-drawn icons representing food items, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: Smaller white text showing the price '€29.90' below the headline.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in white, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Additional info
elements.description: Smaller text indicating 'night deals available' positioned below the price.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the top left corner indicating 'UGC' in white text.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes €2990 ble Order now

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner with the text 'CraveLoop' in a bold font.
